evidence: Created ultragoal artifacts and began platform/plugin contract inspection.

Added workspace.fileRenderers capability and framework-neutral FileRenderer contracts in platform-api plus rendererEntry/contributes.fileRenderers manifest types in plugin-api; plugin-api contract tests passed.

Added Solid-backed packages/plugin-ui exports and mountPluginUI; import boundary rules/tests allow core plugins to import @zorid/plugin-ui while keeping platform-api framework-neutral; plugin-ui and boundary tests passed.

Implemented plugin-host fileRenderer manifest validation, community rejection, register.fileRenderer capability enforcement, and static extension/surface/priority matcher; kernel plugin-host tests passed.
Added trusted desktop static fileRenderer loader map, resolveFileRenderer IPC/preload bridge, full-page renderer fallback UI, and markdown-embed adapter registration; desktop runtime tests passed.
Added .zbase dogfood fileRenderer contribution and Solid-backed renderer implementation in core data-views; core manifest and editor live-preview fallback override tests passed.
Focused regression suite passed: 8 files, 55 tests. pnpm typecheck passed. pnpm lint:boundaries passed. pnpm lint passed with Biome checking 252 files and import boundaries ok.

Added resolveFileRenderer fallback to the desktop-file-tree-toolbar test desktop bridge mock so App.vue full-page renderer resolution falls back cleanly; pnpm test tests/desktop-file-tree-toolbar.test.ts passed: 1 file, 7 tests.

Fixed MarkdownEditor.vue open-reference block action construction so fragment is omitted when undefined under exactOptionalPropertyTypes. pnpm desktop:build passed. pnpm quality:fast passed: lint, typecheck, and 63 Vitest files / 370 tests.
